editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 13 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 13 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: Right to Information (RTI) Act 2005 — Transparency Tool
articles.title_hi: सूचना का अधिकार (RTI) अधिनियम 2005 — पारदर्शिता का साधन
articles.summary: RTI Act empowers citizens to seek information from public authorities within 30 days — a landmark transparency law.
articles.summary_hi: RTI अधिनियम नागरिकों को 30 दिन में सार्वजनिक प्राधिकरणों से सूचना मांगने का अधिकार देता है।
articles.content:
The Right to Information Act, 2005 came into force on 12 October 2005, empowering every citizen to request information from any public authority.

Public Information Officers (PIOs) must respond within 30 days (48 hours for life/liberty matters). Appeals go to First Appellate Authority, then State/Central Information Commissions.

RTI covers Central and State governments, local bodies, PSUs, and bodies substantially funded by government. Exemptions exist for national security, personal privacy, and cabinet papers.

For IB ACIO: enactment (2005), 30-day timeline, and Information Commissions are frequently asked.
articles.content_hi:
RTI अधिनियम 2005 12 अक्टूबर 2005 से लागू। 30 दिन में जवाब (जीवन/स्वतंत्रता: 48 घंटे)।

PIO → First Appellate → Information Commission।

IB ACIO: 2005, 30 दिन — याद रखें।
articles.question: Under RTI Act, what is the time limit for PIO to respond (normal cases)?
articles.question_hi: RTI अधिनियम में PIO को जवाब देने की सामान्य समय सीमा क्या है?
articles.explanation: PIO must provide information within 30 days of receiving the RTI application.
articles.explanation_hi: PIO को RTI आवेदन मिलने के 30 दिन में सूचना देनी होती है।
articles.moreInfo: Central CIC and State CICs are statutory bodies under RTI Act. Penalty up to ₹25,000 for delay.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Central/State CIC वैधानिक निकाय। देरी पर ₹25,000 तक जुर्माना।

articles.title: BRICS — Members, Expansion, and India’s Role
articles.title_hi: BRICS — सदस्य, विस्तार और भारत की भूमिका
articles.summary: BRICS expanded in 2024 with Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE, and Saudi Arabia joining the grouping originally of Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa.
articles.summary_hi: BRICS 2024 में Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE, Saudi Arabia शामिल — मूल: Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa।
articles.content:
BRICS originally comprised Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa. The name comes from the first letters of original members (before South Africa joined in 2010).

In 2024, the grouping expanded to include Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE, and Saudi Arabia. BRICS focuses on economic cooperation, reform of global governance, and alternatives to Western-dominated institutions.

India hosted the BRICS Summit virtually in 2021 and has advocated for a balanced, inclusive BRICS agenda. The New Development Bank (NDB) is BRICS' multilateral development bank, headquartered in Shanghai.

For IB ACIO: original 5, 2024 expansion members, and NDB (Shanghai) are key.
articles.content_hi:
BRICS: Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa। 2024 विस्तार: Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE, Saudi Arabia।

NDB (New Development Bank) Shanghai में। IB ACIO: 5+5 सदस्य, NDB — याद रखें।
articles.question: Where is the New Development Bank (NDB) of BRICS headquartered?
articles.question_hi: BRICS का New Development Bank (NDB) कहाँ स्थित है?
articles.explanation: The New Development Bank (NDB) is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
articles.explanation_hi: NDB का मुख्यालय Shanghai, China में है।
articles.moreInfo: NDB formerly BRICS Development Bank. Compare with IMF (Washington) and World Bank (Washington).
articles.moreInfo_hi: NDB पहले BRICS Development Bank। IMF/World Bank Washington में।

articles.title: India Becomes World’s Fifth Largest Economy
articles.title_hi: भारत दुनिया की पांचवीं सबसे बड़ी अर्थव्यवस्था बना
articles.summary: India overtook the UK to become the 5th largest economy by nominal GDP — a milestone in India’s economic growth story.
articles.summary_hi: भारत UK को पीछे छोड़कर nominal GDP में 5वीं सबसे बड़ी अर्थव्यवस्था बना।
articles.content:
India became the world's fifth-largest economy by nominal GDP, surpassing the United Kingdom. The top four are USA, China, Germany, and Japan (order may vary by year/method).

India's GDP growth has been among the fastest among major economies, driven by services, manufacturing (Make in India), digital economy, and domestic consumption.

India aims to become a $5 trillion economy and subsequently $30 trillion by 2047 (Amrit Kaal vision). NITI Aayog and RBI publish growth projections regularly.

For IB ACIO: 5th rank, $5 trillion target, and Amrit Kaal 2047 are economy highlights.
articles.content_hi:
भारत nominal GDP में 5वां — USA, China, Germany, Japan के बाद।

$5 trillion लक्ष्य, 2047 तक $30 trillion (Amrit Kaal)।

IB ACIO: 5वां स्थान, Amrit Kaal — याद रखें।
articles.question: India is currently ranked as the world’s ___ largest economy by nominal GDP.
articles.question_hi: nominal GDP में भारत वर्तमान में दुनिया की ___ सबसे बड़ी अर्थव्यवस्था है।
articles.explanation: India is the fifth-largest economy by nominal GDP, having overtaken the UK.
articles.explanation_hi: भारत nominal GDP में UK को पीछे छोड़कर पांचवीं सबसे बड़ी अर्थव्यवस्था है।
articles.moreInfo: PPP basis: India is 3rd largest. Nominal vs PPP — both rankings appear in exams.
articles.moreInfo_hi: PPP आधार पर भारत 3rd। Nominal vs PPP — दोनों याद रखें।

articles.title: Tejas — India’s Indigenous Light Combat Aircraft
articles.title_hi: तेजस — भारत का स्वदेशी लाइट कॉम्बैट एयरक्राफ्ट
articles.summary: Tejas (LCA) is a single-engine multirole fighter designed by ADA and built by HAL — a flagship Atmanirbhar defence project.
articles.summary_hi: तेजस (LCA) ADA द्वारा डिज़ाइन, HAL द्वारा निर्मित — आत्मनिर्भर रक्षा की प्रमुख परियोजना।
articles.content:
The Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) Tejas is India's indigenous fourth-generation multirole fighter aircraft.

Designed by Aeronautical Development Agency (ADA) and manufactured by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL). It received Final Operational Clearance (FOC) and has been inducted into the Indian Air Force.

Tejas Mk-1A is an improved variant with AESA radar, air-to-air refuelling, and enhanced weapons. IAF has placed orders for 83 Mk-1A aircraft.

For IB ACIO: developer (ADA/HAL), generation (4th gen), and Mk-1A orders are defence tech facts.
articles.content_hi:
LCA तेजस ADA/HAL द्वारा स्वदेशी 4th gen fighter। FOC प्राप्त, IAF में।

Tejas Mk-1A: AESA radar, 83 aircraft order। IB ACIO: ADA, HAL, Mk-1A — याद रखें।
articles.question: Tejas LCA is manufactured by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: तेजस LCA किस संगठन द्वारा निर्मित है?
articles.explanation: Tejas is manufactured by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), designed by ADA.
articles.explanation_hi: तेजस HAL द्वारा निर्मित, ADA द्वारा डिज़ाइन।
articles.moreInfo: DRDO develops technology; HAL manufactures aircraft. BEL makes electronics.
articles.moreInfo_hi: DRDO तकनीक, HAL विमान, BEL इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स।

articles.title: Digital India Programme — Vision and Key Pillars
articles.title_hi: डिजिटल इंडिया कार्यक्रम — दृष्टि और मुख्य स्तंभ
articles.summary: Digital India (2015) aims to transform India into a digitally empowered society with broadband, e-governance, and digital literacy.
articles.summary_hi: डिजिटल इंडिया (2015) भारत को डिजिटल रूप से सशक्त समाज बनाने का लक्ष्य रखता है।
articles.content:
Digital India was launched in July 2015 with three vision areas: Infrastructure as Utility, Governance & Services on Demand, and Digital Empowerment of Citizens.

Key initiatives include: BharatNet (rural broadband), UMANG app, DigiLocker, Aadhaar-enabled services, Common Service Centres (CSCs), and JAM trinity (Jan Dhan, Aadhaar, Mobile).

India Stack (Aadhaar, UPI, DigiLocker, eSign) powers digital public infrastructure used globally as a model.

For IB ACIO: launch (2015), three pillars, and JAM trinity are digital governance essentials.
articles.content_hi:
डिजिटल इंडिया जुलाई 2015। तीन क्षेत्र: Infrastructure, Governance on Demand, Digital Empowerment।

BharatNet, DigiLocker, CSC, JAM (Jan Dhan, Aadhaar, Mobile)।

IB ACIO: 2015, JAM — याद रखें।
articles.question: Digital India programme was launched in which year?
articles.question_hi: डिजिटल इंडिया कार्यक्रम किस वर्ष शुरू हुआ?
articles.explanation: Digital India was launched in July 2015 by the Government of India.
articles.explanation_hi: डिजिटल इंडिया जुलाई 2015 में शुरू किया गया।
articles.moreInfo: Related: DPDP Act 2023 (10 July edition). India Stack is exportable digital infrastructure model.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: DPDP 2023 (10 जुलाई)। India Stack वैश्विक मॉडल।

articles.title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana — Crop Insurance for Farmers
articles.title_hi: पीएम फसल बीमा योजना — किसानों के लिए फसल बीमा
articles.summary: PMFBY provides comprehensive crop insurance at low premium rates — 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial crops.
articles.summary_hi: PMFBY कम प्रीमियम पर व्यापक फसल बीमा — Kharif 2%, Rabi 1.5%, वाणिज्यिक 5%।
articles.content:
Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) was launched in 2016, replacing earlier crop insurance schemes (NAIS, MNAIS).

Farmers pay uniform premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi food/oilseed crops, and 5% for commercial/horticultural crops. Remaining premium is shared by Centre and State.

It uses technology (remote sensing, smartphones) for faster claim settlement. All farmers including sharecroppers are eligible.

For IB ACIO: launch (2016), premium rates (2%, 1.5%, 5%), and comparison with PM-KISAN are scheme GK staples.
articles.content_hi:
PMFBY 2016 में शुरू। प्रीमियम: Kharif 2%, Rabi 1.5%, वाणिज्यिक 5%।

Centre+State बाकी प्रीमियम। IB ACIO: 2016, 2/1.5/5% — याद रखें।
articles.question: What is the farmer premium rate for Kharif crops under PMFBY?
articles.question_hi: PMFBY में Kharif फसलों के लिए किसान प्रीमियम दर क्या है?
articles.explanation: Farmers pay 2% premium for Kharif crops under PM Fasal Bima Yojana.
articles.explanation_hi: PMFBY में Kharif के लिए किसान 2% प्रीमियम देते हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Related: PM-KISAN (11 July), MGNREGA (12 July). Agriculture scheme trio for exams.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: PM-KISAN, MGNREGA। कृषि योजना तिकड़ी।

articles.title: Directive Principles of State Policy — Part IV
articles.title_hi: राज्य के नीति निर्देशक सिद्धांत — भाग IV
articles.summary: Part IV (Articles 36-51) contains DPSP — guidelines for governance, non-justiciable but fundamental in law-making.
articles.summary_hi: भाग IV (धारा 36-51) DPSP — शासन दिशानिर्देश, गैर-न्यायिक परंतु कानून बनाने में मौलिक।
articles.content:
Directive Principles of State Policy (DPSP) are in Part IV (Articles 36-51) of the Constitution, inspired by the Irish Constitution.

They are non-justiciable (not enforceable in courts) but are fundamental in governance and law-making. Key principles include: social and economic justice, equal pay for equal work, right to work/education, living wage, and protection of environment.

Article 44 directs the State to endeavour for a Uniform Civil Code. Article 48 promotes agriculture and animal husbandry on modern lines.

For IB ACIO: Part IV, non-justiciable nature, and key articles (44 UCC, 43A worker participation) are polity favourites.
articles.content_hi:
DPSP भाग IV (धारा 36-51), Irish संविधान से प्रेरित। गैर-न्यायिक।

धारा 44: UCC का प्रयास। धारा 48: कृषि/पशुपालन।

IB ACIO: Part IV, गैर-न्यायिक — अक्सर पूछा जाता है।
articles.question: Directive Principles of State Policy are contained in which Part of the Constitution?
articles.question_hi: DPSP संविधान के किस भाग में हैं?
articles.explanation: DPSP are enshrined in Part IV (Articles 36-51) of the Indian Constitution.
articles.explanation_hi: DPSP भारतीय संविधान के भाग IV (धारा 36-51) में हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Contrast: Fundamental Rights (Part III) = justiciable. DPSP (Part IV) = non-justiciable. Part IVA = Fundamental Duties.
articles.moreInfo_hi: FR (III) = न्यायिक। DPSP (IV) = गैर-न्यायिक। IVA = मौलिक कर्तव्य।

articles.title: Cricket World Cup 2023 — India as Host
articles.summary: India hosted the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023. Australia won the final defeating India at Ahmedabad’s Narendra Modi Stadium.
articles.summary_hi: भारत ने ICC CWC 2023 की मेजबानी की। Australia ने Ahmedabad में India को हराकर जीता।
articles.content:
The ICC Cricket World Cup 2023 was hosted entirely by India from October to November 2023 across 10 venues.

Australia won the tournament, defeating India in the final at Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad. This was India's fourth time hosting the World Cup.

Virat Kohli won the Player of the Tournament award with 765 runs. Mohammed Shami was the leading wicket-taker.

For IB ACIO: host (India 2023), winner (Australia), final venue (Ahmedabad), and Kohli as POTM are sports CA facts.
articles.content_hi:
CWC 2023 अक्टूबर-नवंबर, पूरा India में। Australia विजेता, final Ahmedabad।

Virat Kohli POTM (765 runs)। Mohammed Shami सर्वाधिक विकेट।

IB ACIO: India host, Australia win — याद रखें।
articles.question: Who won the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023?
articles.question_hi: ICC Cricket World Cup 2023 किसने जीता?
articles.explanation: Australia won the 2023 Cricket World Cup, defeating India in the final at Ahmedabad.
articles.explanation_hi: Australia ने 2023 CWC जीता, Ahmedabad final में India को हराया।
articles.moreInfo: 2011 CWC: India won (Wankhede, Mumbai). 2019: England won (Lord's).
